notes: BNZ 'Internet Banking for Business Guide - Statement Data Files' (Jan 2024). Official GIFTS-format field-layout reference: domestic balance/transaction records (opening/closing balance, account suffix totals), foreign-currency (-30/-50/51/52/53), NAB records, debit/credit transaction codes. NO populated example transaction table - it is a record/field spec (best CSV/data-file field-layout source). 29 pages.
